articles.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
articles.description: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation

articles.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
articles.description: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.

articles.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
articles.description: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

articles.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
articles.description: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

articles.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
articles.description: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

articles.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
articles.description: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

articles.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
articles.description: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

articles.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
articles.description: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

articles.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
articles.description: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

articles.title: From games to biology and beyond: 10 years of AlphaGo’s impact
articles.description: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how it is catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.
